title: nepeta adenoclada
intro: Nepeta adenoclada, also known as Adenocline catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant's extracts have been used to relieve respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, and to soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Nepeta adenoclada can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
